3287460.name: Dark Assassin: Trial Chambers
3287460.description:
THIS GAME IS IN ALPHA 1.0.0. & WILL RECEIVE SMALL TWEAKS AND UPDATES

Play as Dark Assassin and maneuver your way through the 8 chambers to fight the Goblin Lord and discover your true intentions. In this quick action paced game, you will find yourself slicing through goblins, bandits, and eyes while zipping across each chamber. Immerse yourself into the thumping music, iconic pixel characters and carefully crafted story as fast as possible to reach a higher score.  Can you achieve the impossible? Find out and play Dark Assassin!
3287460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
